creator: ken@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is a known problem.  When we integrated CAM into the FreeBSD source tree, 
we made it well known that some SCSI controllers that had been previously 
supported would not be supported initially.  At some point, we may add support 
for the AMD 53c974, but for now, it's unsupported.  It is on our list of 
controllers to support, though.
